items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are accelerating, with AI now helping cybercriminals move faster and cause more damage before organisations can respond. Australian businesses are being urged to shift focus toward recovery planning — not just prevention — as attacks become harder to stop before they cause harm. Separately, a new report shows 79% of organisations have experienced a security incident caused by a known, unpatched vulnerability, a reminder that keeping software up to date remains critical.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team that all software and systems are receiving regular updates — many successful attacks exploit security flaws that patches already exist for.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already experiencing AI-related security incidents represents urgent national vulnerability.
